title: Set sprint dates when I set a sprint

posts.author: mrmontero (Moises)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! First time poster here.

I’m looking for help with our development board where we set up tasks into specific sprints but then need to figure out sprint dates in our head after we input the number.

Is there a way for us to simply type the sprint number and have the date range autopopulate? EG. I write down 14 in the “sprint” column and have the “timeline” column set the date ranger from Aug. 30 - Sept 10

Thanks in advance for the help.
